name: Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz (1/2 of a 7oz can) Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a skillet.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Pour into a 4-quart casserole.
4. Top with cheese.
5. Mix the rest of the ingredients together.
6. Pour over the top of meat and cheese.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F for 30 minutes (or until the topping is done).
